revision_summary: Four targeted fixes required: (1) Correct the schema_reference in cherry_pick_moments[2] (01:50) from 'coaching_philosophy.bill_anchoring' to the orphaned_flow / time-gated DQ framework — the bill anchoring citation is a misfit that produces a misleading coaching note. (2) Add a missed moment at 00:05 (intro execution gap as root cause of legitimacy failure) and at 01:54 (rep correctly ran orphaned_flow contract-status check — a partial positive that Stage 3 omitted, making the rep look worse than the transcript supports). (3) Revise the outcome_dispute reasoning to note that Palmetto is NOT on the schema's hard-DQ competitor list — the DQ is contract-based, not company-based, and this distinction matters for coaching framing. (4) Reframe the suggested verbatim script in coaching_focus[0] as illustrative intent only (not canonical Ion language), per the schema's numeric_discipline and strategy_recognition prohibitions on fabricating Ion-voice alternatives. Secondary: soften the 00:32 reactive-failure framing to reflect that the rep was mid-sentence (autopilot) rather than deliberately ignoring the customer's tone signal.
